news.title:
US plans 100% tariff on patented pharma imports may disrupt Indian CDMOs.
Key players like Piramal Pharma, Glenmark, and Sun Pharma could face market uncertainty.
news.summary:
US plans 100% tariff on patented pharma imports may disrupt Indian CDMOs.
Key players like Piramal Pharma, Glenmark, and Sun Pharma could face market uncertainty.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma's subsidiary completes acquisition of Kenalog from Bristol-Myers Squibb.
This acquisition enhances its Complex Hospital Generics portfolio across US, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma's subsidiary completes acquisition of Kenalog from Bristol-Myers Squibb.
This acquisition enhances its Complex Hospital Generics portfolio across US, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.

news.title:
Eight stocks, including Adani Power, Cochin Shipyard, and Hyundai Motor India, enter the F&O segment starting April 1.
HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Technologies, and Torrent Power exit F&O post this series; stock lot sizes vary by company.
news.summary:
Eight stocks, including Adani Power, Cochin Shipyard, and Hyundai Motor India, enter the F&O segment starting April 1.
HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Technologies, and Torrent Power exit F&O post this series; stock lot sizes vary by company.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma Solutions achieves 1,500 ADC batch milestone at Grangemouth, showcasing advanced capabilities in bioconjugate therapies.
Facility supports ADCelerate program with seamless tech transfers, regulatory accreditations, and global network integration for drug lifecycle solutions.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma Solutions achieves 1,500 ADC batch milestone at Grangemouth, showcasing advanced capabilities in bioconjugate therapies.
Facility supports ADCelerate program with seamless tech transfers, regulatory accreditations, and global network integration for drug lifecycle solutions.

news.title:
Gujarat Pollution Control Board revokes closure of Piramal Pharma's Dahej site.
Operations at Dahej plant resume temporarily; final approval awaited.
news.summary:
Gujarat Pollution Control Board revokes closure of Piramal Pharma's Dahej site.
Operations at Dahej plant resume temporarily; final approval awaited.

news.title:
US FDA inspected Piramal Pharma's Telangana facility; issued Form 483 with 4 procedural observations.
Observations are VAI with no data integrity issues. Company preparing detailed response within timelines.
news.summary:
US FDA inspected Piramal Pharma's Telangana facility; issued Form 483 with 4 procedural observations.
Observations are VAI with no data integrity issues. Company preparing detailed response within timelines.

news.title: Piramal Pharma challenges Gujarat pollution board's plant closure order in SC.
news.summary: Piramal Pharma challenges Gujarat pollution board's plant closure order in SC.

news.title:
Gujarat Pollution Control Board orders Piramal Pharma's Dahej plant shutdown in 48 hours.
Closure due to alleged Water Act violation; Rs. 15L bank guarantee mandated for one year.
news.summary:
Gujarat Pollution Control Board orders Piramal Pharma's Dahej plant shutdown in 48 hours.
Closure due to alleged Water Act violation; Rs. 15L bank guarantee mandated for one year.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma sees early recovery signs in CDMO demand despite continued pressure.
Challenges include inventory destocking and slower early-stage order inflows this year.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma sees early recovery signs in CDMO demand despite continued pressure.
Challenges include inventory destocking and slower early-stage order inflows this year.

news.title: Piramal Pharma posts weak Q3 performance with both topline and bottomline missing estimates.

news.title: Piramal Pharma indicates early recovery signs following losses in Q3.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma targets $2B CDMO revenue by 2030 with $90M expansion.
The company plans to achieve growth through strategic acquisitions.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma targets $2B CDMO revenue by 2030 with $90M expansion.
The company plans to achieve growth through strategic acquisitions.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma Ltd announced key management changes, designating Rashida Najmi, Jatin Lal, Sandeep Rathod, and Puneet Rajput as Senior Management Personnel.
Ms. Tanya Sanish resigned as Company Secretary; Pratibha Mishra appointed as Interim Company Secretary effective 21st February 2026.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma Ltd announced key management changes, designating Rashida Najmi, Jatin Lal, Sandeep Rathod, and Puneet Rajput as Senior Management Personnel.
Ms. Tanya Sanish resigned as Company Secretary; Pratibha Mishra appointed as Interim Company Secretary effective 21st February 2026.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma acquires Kenalog brands from Bristol Myers Squibb for $35M upfront, $65M contingent.
Kenalog, an anti-inflammatory drug, is marketed in 15 countries; deal expands Piramal's global reach.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma acquires Kenalog brands from Bristol Myers Squibb for $35M upfront, $65M contingent.
Kenalog, an anti-inflammatory drug, is marketed in 15 countries; deal expands Piramal's global reach.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma reports Q2 FY26 net loss of ₹99.2 crore with 8.8% YoY sales decline.
Operating margins dropped significantly, raising concerns over profitability and debt management.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma reports Q2 FY26 net loss of ₹99.2 crore with 8.8% YoY sales decline.
Operating margins dropped significantly, raising concerns over profitability and debt management.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma shares rose 3.8% to Rs 159.8 post-Q3FY26 results.
The stock gained 4% intraday on NSE after results announcement.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma shares rose 3.8% to Rs 159.8 post-Q3FY26 results.
The stock gained 4% intraday on NSE after results announcement.

news.title:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.
news.summary:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.

news.title:
Piramal Pharma's board meeting on 28th Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month FY25 results.
Trading window remains closed from 1st Jan to 30th Jan 2026 as per SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Piramal Pharma's board meeting on 28th Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month FY25 results.
Trading window remains closed from 1st Jan to 30th Jan 2026 as per SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
HDFC Securities initiates coverage on Divi's Labs, Sai Life, Piramal Pharma, Anthem Bio, and Laurus Labs.
India's CRDMO market is poised to outpace APAC, with strong long-term growth in pharma sector.
news.summary:
